question:
[Previous Feedback] sprint_review_summary.md.bak was correctly created before modification.

Please update day16/q2_timeline.json to fix the incorrectly formatted date fields — change all dates to ISO 8601 format with +08:00 timezone offset.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 10:56 EDT] [Previous Feedback] sprint_review_summary.md.bak was correctly created before modification.

Please update day16/q2_timeline.json to fix the incorrectly formatted date fields — change all dates to ISO 8601 format with +08:00 timezone offset.

Updated `day16/q2_timeline.json` to use **ISO 8601 datetimes with `+08:00`** for all date fields (`start_date`, `end_date`, `deadline`) and normalized date-only values to midnight (`T00:00:00+08:00`).

Backup created first: `day16/q2_timeline.json.bak`.
